pages.title: Music Is My Drug (Rooklyn Mix)
pages.tagline: Turn up now: Music Is My Drug.

pages.body: This driving D major dance-pop anthem at 129 bpm explores music as a powerful life-saving substance that transforms pain into euphoria. Starting with intimate verses, the track builds to a massive chorus where strangers unite through rhythm. The rolling bassline and punchy drums create an intense physical sensation, while anthemic vocals deliver catharsis and vitality. As intensity rises from 0.12 to explosive peaks of one pure joy, listeners experience escapism and unity in sound. This journey turns silence into gold and makes broken things shine under the rhythm.
pages.styleSentence: A driving D major dance-pop track at 129 bpm featuring a rolling bassline, punchy drums, and an anthemic vocal delivery that builds from intimate verses to a massive, euphoric chorus.
